product: COMMENT ON streaming tables is now GA
tagline: COMMENT ON TABLE to add or update comments on streaming tables is now generally available.
what_it_does: COMMENT ON TABLE to add or update comments on streaming tables is now generally available. Applies to: Databricks SQL Databricks Runtime Sets a comment on a catalog, schema, table, column, share, recipient, provider, or volume. note If you want to add an AI generated comment for a table or table column managed by Unity Catalog, see Add AI generated comments to Unity Catalog objects.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
